summary:

Preferences

Useful for future conversations
- Open YouTube searches for requested songs and confirm when done
- Retrieve, filter, or open job listings (global or Nepal‑specific); offer to save notes or draft cover letters

- Use primary email only for legitimate communications; avoid apostrophes or special characters in email subjects and bodies
- Provide salary ranges for AI‑Engineer positions in Nepal on request
- For any visual query, always use look_and_describe, reassure the user that descriptions are not stored, and recall prior image details if needed
- Be prepared to explain data‑mining and machine‑learning terminology such as Dice coefficient when asked
